2286230.name: Galactic Economy
2286230.description:
Can you rise to power and lead the Galactic Economy?

The galaxy is full of opportunity—and danger. Build your economic empire, buy space stations, invest in profitable trade

routes, and outsmart your rivals in this digital board-game experience set among the stars.

Galactic Economy combines classic board-game charm with modern strategy gameplay. Roll the dice, make impactful

decisions, and shape your own path to power—solo or with friends.


Wishlist now to join the economic race! 🚀⭐

About This Game

In Galactic Economy, your goal is simple: climb to the top of the interstellar market.

But the journey? Anything but simple.



Travel through sectors, claim valuable locations, and upgrade your fleet as you build your financial influence across

the galaxy. Every roll of the dice brings new opportunities—new trades, new risks, and new ways to surpass your

opponents.

Choose your strategy:

  • Invest aggressively,

  • expand carefully,

  • or build a stable passive-income empire.

Every playthrough is different.

Key Features

🌌 Galactic Board-Game Strategy

Roll dice, advance through sectors, acquire stations, and expand your influence. Easy to learn, strategic to master.

🔁 Endless Replayability

Each session unfolds differently through varied events, dice outcomes, and strategic decisions.

🤖 Solo or Multiplayer Fun

Play alone, against AI players, or challenge your friends in digital board-game competition.

🚀 Build & Upgrade Your Empire

Buy spaceships, invest in key sectors, and create revenue streams that grow with every round.

🎲 Accessible Yet Strategic

Designed to capture the charm of classic board games, with modern digital conveniences.
2286230.supported_languages:
英语*, 德语, 法语, 意大利语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言
